meaning: Beta制大尺寸磁带录像系统
examples: Betamax disappeared from all but professional use.
It is to the keyboard what Esperanto is to language and Betamax to videotape.
We watched bootlegged copies of the show, passed around on old Betamax cassettes.
Sony engineers invented Betamax, only to see the cheaper VHS become the standard for videocassette recorders.
Police also seized a sizable quantity of VHS and Betamax video tapes, 8mm tapes and discs.
